statements.__comment: This is a clean-up statement to remove custom attributes
statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPOrganization{id:$GCP_ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPProject{id: $GCP_PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(cluster:GKECluster) WHERE cluster.exposed_internet IS NOT NULL REMOVE cluster.exposed_internet, cluster.exposed_internet_type, cluster.publicContext return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: This sets the exposed_internet attribute using coalesce to handle null values
statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPOrganization{id:$GCP_ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPProject{id: $GCP_PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(cluster:GKECluster) WHERE coalesce(cluster.private_nodes, false) = false OR coalesce(cluster.private_endpoint_enabled, false) = false OR coalesce(cluster.master_authorized_networks, false) = false SET cluster.exposed_internet = true

statements.__comment: This sets the exposed_internet_type for exposed GKE clusters
statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPOrganization{id:$GCP_ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPProject{id: $GCP_PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(cluster:GKECluster) WHERE cluster.exposed_internet = true WITH cluster, CASE WHEN coalesce(cluster.private_nodes, false) = false THEN ['public_nodes'] ELSE [] END + CASE WHEN coalesce(cluster.private_endpoint_enabled, false) = false THEN ['public_endpoint'] ELSE [] END + CASE WHEN coalesce(cluster.master_authorized_networks, false) = false THEN ['no_master_authorized_networks'] ELSE [] END as exposureTypes SET cluster.exposed_internet_type = exposureTypes

statements.__comment: This generates the publicContext for exposed GKE clusters
statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPOrganization{id:$GCP_ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPProject{id: $GCP_PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(cluster:GKECluster) WHERE cluster.exposed_internet = true WITH cluster, CASE WHEN coalesce(cluster.private_nodes, false) = false THEN ['public_nodes'] ELSE [] END + CASE WHEN coalesce(cluster.private_endpoint_enabled, false) = false THEN ['public_endpoint'] ELSE [] END + CASE WHEN coalesce(cluster.master_authorized_networks, false) = false THEN ['no_master_authorized_networks'] ELSE [] END as exposureTypes SET cluster.publicContext = apoc.convert.toJson([{resource: cluster.id, resourceType: 'gcp-compute-gke-cluster', context: [{clusterId: cluster.id, clusterName: cluster.name, endpoint: cluster.endpoint, location: cluster.location, privateNodes: cluster.private_nodes, privateEndpointEnabled: cluster.private_endpoint_enabled, masterAuthorizedNetworks: cluster.master_authorized_networks, exposureTypes: exposureTypes, status: cluster.status, currentMasterVersion: cluster.current_master_version}]}])
